jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.jd_full: Estamos buscando um Product Manager altamente qualificado para liderar a direção estratégica e execução de nossos sistemas operacionais, com foco no desenvolvimento de gerenciamento de contas de clientes. Requisitos incluem experiência comprovada como Product Manager, expertise em sistemas de Autenticação e Gerenciamento de Identidade, ferramentas e capacidades de IA, sistemas críticos e altamente disponíveis, construção de soluções orientadas por dados, familiaridade com Design de Arquitetura de Software, uso do modelo OKR para alinhar metas da equipe com a estratégia de negócios, gestão de stakeholders e conhecimento em metodologias ágeis de desenvolvimento. Responsabilidades incluem gerenciar o domínio de contas dos clientes, definir a visão e o roadmap do produto para os sistemas centrais da Bitso, supervisionar a integração e estratégia para Autenticação, Gerenciamento de Identidade e integrá-los ao gerenciamento de contas, utilizar o modelo OKR para definir metas ambiciosas, trabalhar com engenheiros, gerentes de engenharia e designers para priorizar recursos, conduzir descobertas internas e testes de usuário para validar conceitos e iterar com base no feedback das Operações e diferentes Unidades de Negócios.

jobs.title: Product Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.jd_full:
Headquarters: Stuttgart,Remote,München

At Olmatic, we develop intelligent, data-driven solutions to make the energy world more sustainable, smarter, and efficient. As a Product Manager, you actively shape our innovative products, recognize market opportunities early, and ensure we build the right solutions to meet our customers’ needs.    •    Creating Impactful Products: Translate customer needs and market analyses into clear product goals, defining innovative features with tangible value.    •    Strategy & Prioritization: Own the product roadmap, prioritize features, and ensure product-market fit through continuous customer feedback and market research.    •    Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Engineering, UX/UI design, and Marketing teams to deliver high-quality products on time.    •    Market & Competitive Analysis: Monitor market trends, identify competitive advantages, and proactively develop strategies for differentiation and positioning.    •    Experience in product management of digital or technical products, ideally in software, SaaS, or renewable energy sectors.    •    Proven ability to translate complex customer requirements into clear user stories and precise product specifications.    •    Familiarity with agile methods, tools such as Jira or Notion, and best practices in product management.    •    Strong analytical skills, strategic thinking, and high customer orientation.    •    Excellent communication skills, proactive initiative, and a pragmatic, solution-oriented mindset.    •    Purpose-driven Tech: Work on real-world challenges in the energy transition and create sustainable technologies with global impact.    •    Flexible & Modern Workplace: Enjoy flexible working conditions, agile methodologies, and an open team culture with flat hierarchies.    •    Room for Growth: We offer you time and opportunities to grow personally and professionally—through training, conferences, and exciting innovation projects.    •    Tech Stack & Innovation: Experiment with cutting-edge technologies, modern tools, and frameworks—with us, you’re always up-to-date.

To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/olmatic-gmbh-product-manager-m-w-d

jobs.title: Project Manager Cloud Migrations and Partner Programs
jobs.jd_full:

Striim is used by enterprise companies to monitor events across any environment, build applications that drive digital transformation, and leverage true real-time analytics to provide a superior experience to their customers. At our company, we believe and expect all of our employees to operate as oneÂ with unlimited potential and dignity.Â  We are looking for a certified Project Management Professional (PMP) to manage the operational execution of cloud migration initiatives and hyperscaler partner program compliance initiatives across Microsoft and Google ecosystems. This role owns the structured coordination, documentation, and governance of migration projects from license provisioning through project tracking, deal registration management, reporting, and cross-functional alignment. The Project Manager ensures migration programs are executed with consistency, accuracy, and accountability. This is a fully remote role with minimal travel requirements. ### Responsibilities #### Migration Execution & Governance - Manage the operational lifecycle of cloud migration projects - Coordinate internal approvals and oversee the migration license issuance - Create and maintain accurate Salesforce opportunities, including: - Migration source and target - Project phase and scope - License details and expiration timelines - Associated customer, partner, and internal contacts - Track license expirations and ensure proactive follow-up - Conduct recurring status check-ins and risk tracki
